reviews.comment:
La estación es muy chica, no encontras muchas variedades de cosas para comprar en el shop. La atención del shop muy buena! Y en la playa en lo particular el que en atendió era un mal educado!

(Translated by Google)
The station is very small, and you don't find a wide variety of things to buy in the shop. The customer service is very good! And at the beach in particular, the customer service agent was rude!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURINTVfMHBBRRAB
